creator: swills@FreeBSD.org
text:
-----BEGIN PGP SIGNED MESSAGE-----
Hash: SHA1

Hi,

I have an updated patch here:

http://people.freebsd.org/~swills/ruby19_and_gems_changes3.diff.txt

(also attached)

This won't change the default Ruby to 1.9, but it will update the Ruby
1.9 to the latest and lay the groundwork for flipping the switch. After
this patch, it should be a simple matter changing the default version in
bsd.ruby.mk.

Anyway, I'd like to request a new -exp run with this patch in place in
preparation for getting this committed. Once that's done, I'll ask for
another -exp run with just the default version changed and see how that
goes. If portmgr@ would like to suggest a better strategy, feel free,
I'm not sure this is the best way.

Thanks,
Steve
